title: Ground Elements World
description: This small mod adds decorative blocks that are generated on world in many biomes.
body:
This small mod adds decorative blocks that are generated on world in many biomes.
The mod itself is made to improve the minecraft world and does not add anything extra. With them, you can, when destroyed by hand, extract all sorts of vanilla resources and resources from this mod.
From the resources obtained by the field of destruction of these blocks, you can craft the same blocks.
